descriptionText: Lagoon 400 S2 For Sale 2016 – An Ideal Choice for Charter and Family CruisingThe Lagoon 400 S2 for sale 2016 represents a good opportunity for sailing enthusiasts looking for a reliable and well-equipped catamaran. Combining performance, comfort, and ample space, this four-cabin version with two crew cabins is perfect for either family vacations or chartering opportunities. With numerous features designed for comfort and ease of use, the Lagoon 400 S2 stands out in the cruising market.Designed for both comfort and efficiency, this 2016 model features innovative engineering that ensures an effortless sailing experience. Whether you’re cruising the coast or embarking on an oceanic adventure, the Lagoon 400 S2 for sale 2016 is equipped with everything you need for a memorable journey on the water. Below are the specifications that highlight its exceptional features and capabilities.Key Features and Specifications:Model: Lagoon 400 S2Year: 2016Engine: 2 x 45 Hp 4-cylinder Yanmar (Special order)Engine Hours: Approximately 3,500 hours (Serviced November 2023)Cabin Configuration: 4 Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins Electric WCs: 4 Electric toilets in cabins + 4 shower bathsVentilation: Each cabin and saloon equipped with ventilatorsWinches: 1 Electric + 3 Manual winchesSail System: Single-handed sail system with classical sail setupRefrigeration: 2 Refrigerators (1 on deck, 1 in galley)Deep Freezer: 1 unitStove: 3-ring stoveOven: 2-layer ovenInverter: 1500 W inverterDiesel Tanks: 2 x 200 LtFresh Water Tank: 600 LtBlack Water Tanks: 4 x 200 LtBoiler: YesBarometer: YesWindlass: Quick Windlass 1000 W (Newly installed November 2023)Dinghy: 3.2 M fibreglass dinghyOutboard Motor: 5 Hp Tohatsu (Serviced November 2023)Sound System: Fusion sound system with Bluetooth connectivityElectronics: B&G Electronics and RadioChartplotter: B&G Zeus 3AIS: YesAnchors: 25 Kg Lewmar anchor with 70 m of 8 mm chain. 15 Kg Danforth foldable anchor (as a backup)Covers: Brand new sprayhood, bimini, lazy bag, and fender cover (awaiting new owner for installation)Safety Equipment: Fire extinguisher, 12 x life jackets This Lagoon 400 S2 for sale 2016 reflects a blend of modern design and functionality. The layout features four spacious cabins, making it perfect for families or groups. With the additional two crew cabins, you can easily accommodate crew members, thereby ensuring a more relaxed and enjoyable sailing experience. The elegant design extends to the saloon, which is not only beautifully arranged but also provides an inviting space to unwind after a day of sailing.Equipped with a powerful double-engine setup, the catamaran delivers reliable performance on the water. The newly serviced engines as of November 2023 ensure that you are ready for your next adventure, whether it be exploring hidden coves or longer ocean passages. The addition of the Quick Windlass enhances your ease of anchoring, allowing for worry-free stops in scenic locations.The thoughtful inclusion of multiple refrigerators, a deep freezer, and an efficient cooking setup ensures you have all the provisions you need for extended trips. The saloon’s appealing vented space, combined with innovative winching systems, supports single-handed sailing, making it accessible for skippers of all experience levels.In conclusion, the Lagoon 400 S2 for sale 2016 is not just a boat; it’s a ticket to adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable memories. Whether you’re angling for charter success or planning a dreamy family cruise, this vessel is ready to meet and exceed your expectations. Don’t miss out on the opportunity to invest in this remarkable catamaran!
descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 400 S2 For Sale 2016 – An Ideal Choice for Charter and Family Cruising

The Lagoon 400 S2 for sale 2016 represents a good opportunity for sailing enthusiasts looking for a reliable and well-equipped catamaran. Combining performance, comfort, and ample space, this four-cabin version with two crew cabins is perfect for either family vacations or chartering opportunities. With numerous features designed for comfort and ease of use, the Lagoon 400 S2 stands out in the cruising market.

Designed for both comfort and efficiency, this 2016 model features innovative engineering that ensures an effortless sailing experience. Whether you’re cruising the coast or embarking on an oceanic adventure, the Lagoon 400 S2 for sale 2016 is equipped with everything you need for a memorable journey on the water. Below are the specifications that highlight its exceptional features and capabilities.

Key Features and Specifications:

  • Model: Lagoon 400 S2
  • Year: 2016
  • Engine: 2 x 45 Hp 4-cylinder Yanmar (Special order)
  • Engine Hours: Approximately 3,500 hours (Serviced November 2023)
  • Cabin Configuration: 4 Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins
    Electric WCs: 4 Electric toilets in cabins + 4 shower baths
  • Ventilation: Each cabin and saloon equipped with ventilators
  • Winches: 1 Electric + 3 Manual winches
  • Sail System: Single-handed sail system with classical sail setup
  • Refrigeration: 2 Refrigerators (1 on deck, 1 in galley)
  • Deep Freezer: 1 unit
  • Stove: 3-ring stove
  • Oven: 2-layer oven
  • Inverter: 1500 W inverter
  • Diesel Tanks: 2 x 200 Lt
  • Fresh Water Tank: 600 Lt
  • Black Water Tanks: 4 x 200 Lt
  • Boiler: Yes
  • Barometer: Yes
  • Windlass: Quick Windlass 1000 W (Newly installed November 2023)
  • Dinghy: 3.2 M fibreglass dinghy
  • Outboard Motor: 5 Hp Tohatsu (Serviced November 2023)
  • Sound System: Fusion sound system with Bluetooth connectivity
  • Electronics: B&G Electronics and Radio
  • Chartplotter: B&G Zeus 3
  • AIS: Yes
  • Anchors: 25 Kg Lewmar anchor with 70 m of 8 mm chain. 15 Kg Danforth foldable anchor (as a backup)
  • Covers: Brand new sprayhood, bimini, lazy bag, and fender cover (awaiting new owner for installation)
  • Safety Equipment: Fire extinguisher, 12 x life jackets

 

This Lagoon 400 S2 for sale 2016 reflects a blend of modern design and functionality. The layout features four spacious cabins, making it perfect for families or groups. With the additional two crew cabins, you can easily accommodate crew members, thereby ensuring a more relaxed and enjoyable sailing experience. The elegant design extends to the saloon, which is not only beautifully arranged but also provides an inviting space to unwind after a day of sailing.

Equipped with a powerful double-engine setup, the catamaran delivers reliable performance on the water. The newly serviced engines as of November 2023 ensure that you are ready for your next adventure, whether it be exploring hidden coves or longer ocean passages. The addition of the Quick Windlass enhances your ease of anchoring, allowing for worry-free stops in scenic locations.

The thoughtful inclusion of multiple refrigerators, a deep freezer, and an efficient cooking setup ensures you have all the provisions you need for extended trips. The saloon’s appealing vented space, combined with innovative winching systems, supports single-handed sailing, making it accessible for skippers of all experience levels.

In conclusion, the Lagoon 400 S2 for sale 2016 is not just a boat; it’s a ticket to adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable memories. Whether you’re angling for charter success or planning a dreamy family cruise, this vessel is ready to meet and exceed your expectations. Don’t miss out on the opportunity to invest in this remarkable catamaran!
